reviews.review_description: I was a homeless wee old boy living on the streets of New York… Until a parrot came flying down with a white box that had glasses inside… I put it on my head and immediately my life came alive as I witnessed there was only 1 game installed… This is where I found ZOMBONK! I played for hours on end exploring and experimenting the cool and unique system of fighting zombies and taking on bosses having endless joy. Then it died… I was so saddd. But when I took that headset off I was soon to see myself in a great mansion and quickly put the device on charge to play again. 100000% recommend.

developer_response.body:
Hi Enderman, this one is on you.  Nothing in the game even remotely hints that dropping an item on the floor will cause another item to spawn. We made an entire trading area to ensure the safe transfer of items. 

I'm sorry, but this is not the game's fault. Please be safer in the future.

reviews.review_description: This game is SO fun! The main goal is to kill zombies and get money while doing so. ANYTHING is possible! Showing art? YUP. Trading? YUP. Outfits? YUP. The community always helps new players so no need to not download because you don’t know how to play. This game even update every other week! Is there much more to ask for? I would recommend this game to anyone!

reviews.review_title: FIX THE TIMER FOR YOUR LOST LOOT
reviews.review_description: Fix the timer! If you die you have a very little amount of time to get it back before it’s gone. Also, ADD A MAP! I don’t care if it’s small but add a feature where you can switch to a map on the watch. Also, maybe add a timer on the watch so you know how much time you have left to collect your items before they’re gone! One last thing, if you do end up added a map on the watch, make a dot or something where your items that you died with are so you know where they are!!! If you add these things I feel it would make the game a whole lot better, and I feel like many would agree, other than that great game!

reviews.review_title: In my opinion, game of the year for vr

I’ve been playing this one for three weeks now and I’m still hooked this game has so much to offer and since it’s an extraction game, it just gets more fun the better you get. This game even gives really good updates every month and mostly weekly QOL updates that just make the game better

And best of all, there is GAMBLING!!!!!!

A really fun game although things are a bit confusing in the war upd but still its fun to just hop on trade then go out and grind somtimes with homies (@freddyvr13 on youtube)

This game is genuinely so fun, the updates are amazing! It takes time to grind, and you don’t get everything instantly. So there is more to work towards, therefore eliminating any sense of boredom progression wise. There has also been a lot of work put into the guns, gameplay, and maps! Overall 10/10, 5 stars! ⭐️

reviews.review_title: This game is truly amazing, I love it!
reviews.review_description: Zombonk delivers an incredibly engaging and polished virtual reality experience that stands out in the genre. From the moment you jump in, the gameplay feels smooth, responsive, and thoughtfully designed, making it easy to get immersed right away. The mechanics are both fun and challenging, striking a great balance that keeps you coming back for more without feeling overwhelming. What really sets it apart is the attention to detail—from the environment design to the interactions, everything feels intentional and well-crafted. On top of that, the community and developers clearly care about the game, with consistent updates and improvements that show real dedication. Overall, Zombonk VR is a must-play for anyone looking for a high-quality, exciting VR experience. If you are seeing this review, I recommend you to buy this game. It's truly one of the best VR zombie survival games out there.

Zombonk VR is honestly one of the most fun VR games I’ve played recently The gameplay is easy to pick up but still really satisfying once you get into it The controls feel smooth and natural which makes a big difference in VR and keeps the experience enjoyable instead of frustrating
What stands out the most is how immersive it is. The visuals and sound design pull you in, and you actually find yourself reacting physically, which is exactly what a good VR game should do
It’s not perfect though The game could use more variety and additional content to keep things fresh over time But even with that it’s still a really solid experience and definitely worth playing if you’re into VR or zombie games

I love this game so much the community is great and supportive. I love how it’s not too pay to win the staff are great updates are made super well and I love how even the owners swear because most owners don’t. Content creators deserve to be seen more you don’t need to do anything special to become a content creator 5 starts!!!

reviews.review_title: Needs URGENT attention to the core
reviews.review_description:
Zombonk has genuine charm, and I found myself having genuine fun the first time I played. However, that day and today, one giant problem is leaping out at me- the skeleton of the game is absolutely pants.
The movement is makes you feel extremely light and difficult to control. Your inventory wipes completely every death. And, most frustratingly of all, the Monster AI *suuuucks.*
It's frustratingly unclear what the zombies are doing, and moreso where they are. They'll turn up, walk up silently, and then "attack" you- also known as stand there while a damage hitbox flashes and you try to run away.

I think that, while the maps and renders and sparkly creations are all very nice, you, the developers, need to step away from the skin, and start looking at the bone. Stop using the paint and go back to building the wall. 
Stop making the game *look pretty* and adding lots of cosmetics and maps, and start making the *core* of the game- the movement, the zombies- better. More satisfying. More clear what's going on.

I'm not wining for the game to be easier. I believe that what you have here is a busted up zombie in makeup. It's lovely and fancy and *looks* nice... but it's rotting flesh underneath.
Please- because this game has so much potential- please step back from whatever maps or cosmetics or new guns you're adding, and properly optimise the game's core. You can do it!
